# Wild Signal
> GEO Intelligence Research Library — AI search visibility research and field guides from Wild Signal Agency (wildsignal.agency)

## About Wild Signal
- [Wild Signal Agency](https://wildsignal.agency): AI intelligence firm focused on Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) and the citation economy.

## GEO Research Library
